decision_note: Selected NSGA-II (multi-objective gate (2 objectives, Pareto-front routing); n_obj=2, n_var=8, obj_type=linear, con_type=nonlinear, convex=unknown, grad=unknown, continuous, constrained).

meta.convexity_check_reason: LLM refinement: nonconvex term 1440/(timing_resistor_kohm*timing_cap_uF) inside squared performance_penalty makes the objective nonconvex
meta.grad_check_reason: LLM refinement: analytic formulas given: total_cost_usd = 0.04*timing_resistor_kohm+... and performance_penalty=(blink_frequency_hz-10)^2 with blink_frequency_hz=1440/(timing_resistor_kohm*timing_cap_uF)
meta.hessian_check_reason: linear objective admits analytic second-order structure
meta.llm_refinement_note: LLM refinement updated: grad_available, is_convex, is_smooth.
meta.smoothness_check_reason: LLM refinement: objectives/constraints use smooth operations (multiplication, division, squares) and variables have positive lower bounds (e.g., timing_resistor_kohm≥1, timing_cap_uF≥0.01)
